chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1141 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on withdrawal statement dated 12.12.2023 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For hearing of main case 14.12.2023 Mr. Sikandar Sadar Siddiqui, Advocate for respondent No.6. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Abdul Latif Memon, Executive Engineer, Provincial Buildings Division, Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. However, he has already filed a statement dated 12.12.2023 withdrawing the petition on the ground that he has already been handed over possession of the quarter. In view of above, the petition stands dismissed as withdrawn. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
